public class Solution { public int change(int amount, int[] coins) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; dp[0] = 1; // Initialize the DP array with base case for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = 0; } // Iterate over each coin type for (int coin : coins) { // Update the DP array based on current coin value for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] += dp[i - coin]; } } return dp[amount]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List addOperators(String num, int target) { List res = new ArrayList<>(); if (num.length() == 0) return res; long currVal = Long.parseLong(num.substring(0, 1)); helper(num, target, 1, currVal, currVal, "" + num.charAt(0), res); for (int i = 2; i <= num.length(); ++i) { if (num.charAt(i - 2) == '0') break; long val = Long.parseLong(num.substring(i - 2, i)); helper(num, target, i, currVal + val, val, "" + num.charAt(i - 1), res); helper(num, target, i, currVal - val, -val, "-" + num.charAt(i - 1), res); helper(num, target, i, currVal - prevVal + prevVal * val, prevVal * val, "*" + num.charAt(i - 1), res); } return res; } }

public class Solution { public int findDuplicate(int[] nums) { int start = nums[0]; int slow = start; int fast = start; do { slow = nums[slow]; fast = nums[nums[fast]]; } while (slow != fast); slow = start; while (slow != fast) { slow = nums[slow]; fast = nums[fast]; } return slow; } }

public class Solution { public boolean wordPatternMatch(String pattern, String s) { Map patternMap = new HashMap<>(); Set words = new HashSet<>(); boolean isMatch = pIndex == pattern.length() && sIndex == s.length(); if (isMatch) return true; if (pIndex == pattern.length() || sIndex == s.length()) return false; char p = pattern.charAt(pIndex); if (patternMap.containsKey(p)) { String word = patternMap.get(p); if (!s.startsWith(word, sIndex)) return false; return backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + word.length(), patternMap, words); } else { for (int length = 1; length <= s.length() - sIndex; length++) { String word = s.substring(sIndex, sIndex + length); if (words.contains(word)) continue; patternMap.put(p, word); words.add(word); if (backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + length, patternMap, words)) return true; patternMap.remove(p); words.remove(word); } } return false; } private boolean backtrack(String pattern, int pIndex, String s, int sIndex, Map patternMap, Set words) { if (pIndex == pattern.length() && sIndex == s.length()) return true; if (pIndex == pattern.length() || sIndex == s.length()) return false; char p = pattern.charAt(pIndex); if (patternMap.containsKey(p)) { String word = patternMap.get(p); if (!s.startsWith(word, sIndex)) return false; return backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + word.length(), patternMap, words); } else { for (int length = 1; length <= s.length() - sIndex; length++) { String word = s.substring(sIndex, sIndex + length); if (words.contains(word)) continue; patternMap.put(p, word); words.add(word); if (backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + length, patternMap, words)) return true; patternMap.remove(p); words.remove(word); } } return false; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public List findMinHeightTrees(int n, int[][] edges) { if (n == 1) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); result.add(0); return result; } int[] degrees = new int[n]; List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } // Build adjacency list and calculate degrees for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); degrees[edge[0]]++; degrees[edge[1]]++; } Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); // Add leaves to the queue for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (degrees[i] == 1) queue.add(i); } while (n > 2) { int leavesSize = queue.size(); n -= leavesSize; // Remove leaves and update degrees of neighbors for (int i = 0; i < leavesSize; i++) { int leaf = queue.poll(); for (int neighbor : adjList.get(leaf)) { if (--degrees[neighbor] == 1) queue.add(neighbor); } } } return new ArrayList<>(queue); } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; int[][] total_count = new int[m][n]; int[][] dist_sum = new int[m][n]; int house_count = 0; int[][] dirs = {{1, 0}, {-1, 0}, {0, 1}, {0, -1}}; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) { house_count++; Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); q.offer(new int[]{i, j}); boolean[][] visited = new boolean[m][n]; bfs(q, visited, dist_sum, total_count); } } } return findMinDistance(total_count, dist_sum, house_count); } private void bfs(Queue q, boolean[][] visited, int[][] dist_sum, int[][] total_count) { int level = 1; while (!q.isEmpty()) { int sz = q.size(); for (int q_i = 0; q_i < sz; q_i++) { int[] cur = q.poll(); int x = cur[0]; int y = cur[1]; updateNeighbors(x, y, level, visited, dist_sum, total_count); } level++; } } private void updateNeighbors(int x, int y, int level, boolean[][] visited, int[][] dist_sum, int[][] total_count) { for (int[] dir : dirs) { int x_new = x + dir[0]; int y_new = y + dir[1]; if (x_new >= 0 && x_new < m && y_new >= 0 && y_new < n && !visited[x_new][y_new] && grid[x_new][y_new] == 0) { visited[x_new][y_new] = true; q.offer(new int[]{x_new, y_new}); dist_sum[x_new][y_new] += level; total_count[x_new][y_new]++; } } } private int findMinDistance(int[][] total_count, int[][] dist_sum, int house_count) { int min_dist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (total_count[i][j] == house_count) { min_dist = Math.min(min_dist, dist_sum[i][j]); } } } return min_dist == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? -1 : min_dist; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int maxProduct(String[] words) { int n = words.length; int[] mask = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (char c : words[i].toCharArray()) { mask[i] |= (1 << (c - 'a')); } } int maxProduct = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = i + 1; j < n; j++) { if ((mask[i] & mask[j]) == 0) { maxProduct = Math.max(maxProduct, words[i].length() * words[j].length()); } } } return maxProduct; } }

public class Solution { public int coinChange(int[] coins, int amount) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; Arrays.fill(dp, amount + 1); dp[0] = 0; // Initialize the DP array with a large value for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = amount + 1; } // Fill the DP table using coins for (int coin : coins) { for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = Math.min(dp[i], dp[i - coin] + 1); } } return dp[amount] > amount ? -1 : dp[amount]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int countComponents(int n, int[][] edges) { List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); } boolean[] visited = new boolean[n]; int connectedComponents = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (!visited[i]) { dfs(i, visited, adjList); connectedComponents++; } } return connectedComponents; } void dfs(int node, boolean[] visited, List> adjList) { visited[node] = true; for (int neighbor : adjList.get(node)) { if (!visited[neighbor]) { dfs(neighbor, visited, adjList); } } } }

public class Solution { public int maxSubArrayLen(int[] nums, int k) { Map totalIndex = new HashMap<>(); int maxLength = 0, total = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { total += nums[i]; if (total == k) maxLength = i + 1; if (totalIndex.containsKey(total - k)) maxLength = Math.max(maxLength, i - totalIndex.get(total - k)); if (!totalIndex.containsKey(total)) totalIndex.put(total, i); } return maxLength; } }

public class Solution { public int rob(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return 0; int[] left = new int[2]; int[] right = new int[2]; if (root.left != null) { left = robHelper(root.left); } if (root.right != null) { right = robHelper(root.right); } int result0 = root.val + left[1] + right[1]; int result1 = Math.max(left[0], left[1]) + Math.max(right[0], right[1]); return Math.max(result0, result1); } private int[] robHelper(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return new int[2]; int[] left = robHelper(node.left); int[] right = robHelper(node.right); int[] result = new int[2]; result[0] = node.val + left[1] + right[1]; result[1] = Math.max(left[0], left[1]) + Math.max(right[0], right[1]); return result; } }

public class Solution { public int numberOfPatterns(int m, int n) { int[][] jumps = new int[10][10]; jumps[1][3] = jumps[3][1] = 2; jumps[1][7] = jumps[7][1] = 4; jumps[3][9] = jumps[9][3] = 6; jumps[7][9] = jumps[9][7] = 8; jumps[1][9] = jumps[9][1] = jumps[2][8] = jumps[8][2] = jumps[3][7] = jumps[7][3] = jumps[4][6] = jumps[6][4] = 5; boolean[] visited = new boolean[10]; int count = 0; for (int i = m; i <= n; ++i) { count += dfs(jumps, visited, 1, i - 1) * 4; // 1, 3, 7, 9 count += dfs(jumps, visited, 2, i - 1) * 4; // 2, 4, 6, 8 count += dfs(jumps, visited, 5, i - 1); // 5 } return count; } private int dfs(int[][] jumps, boolean[] visited, int curr, int remaining) { if (remaining < 0) return 0; if (remaining == 0) return 1; visited[curr] = true; int count = 0; for (int next = 1; next <= 9; ++next) { if (!visited[next] && (jumps[curr][next] == 0 || visited[jumps[curr][next]])) { count += dfs(jumps, visited, next, remaining - 1); } } visited[curr] = false; return count; } }

public class Solution { public int wiggleMaxLength(int[] nums) { int length = nums.length; if (length < 2) return length; int up = 1, down = 1; for (int i = 1; i < length; ++i) { if (nums[i] > nums[i - 1]) up = down + 1; else if (nums[i] < nums[i - 1]) down = up + 1; } return Math.max(up, down); } }

public class Solution { public int characterReplacement(String s, int k) { int colCount = s.length(); int left = 0, right = 0, maxFreq = 0, result = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (right = 0; right < colCount; right++) { freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']++; maxFreq = Math.max(maxFreq, freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']); if (right - left + 1 - maxFreq > k) { freq[s.charAt(left) - 'A']--; left++; } result = Math.max(result, right - left + 1); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int minMoves2(int[] nums) { Arrays.sort(nums); int mid = nums[nums.length / 2]; List movesList = Arrays.stream(nums) .map(num -> Math.abs(num - mid)) .boxed() .collect(Collectors.toList()); return movesList.stream().reduce(0, Integer::sum); } }

public class Solution { public int getMaxRepetitions(String s1, int n1, String s2, int n2) { return computeGetMaxRepetitions(s1, n1, s2, n2); } private int computeGetMaxRepetitions(String s1, int n1, String s2, int n2) { int count1 = 0, count2 = 0, i = 0, j = 0; while (count1 < n1) { if (s1.charAt(i) == s2.charAt(j)) { j++; if (j == s2.length()) { j = 0; count2++; } } i++; if (i == s1.length()) { i = 0; count1++; } } return count2 / n2; } }

public class Solution { public String validateIP(String queryIP) { if (queryIP.split("\\.", -1).length == 4 && isValidIPv4(queryIP)) return "IPv4"; if (queryIP.split(":", -1).length == 8 && isValidIPv6(queryIP)) return "IPv6"; return "Neither"; } private boolean isValidIPv4(String queryIP) { String[] parts = queryIP.split("\\.", -1); for (String part : parts) { if (part.length() == 0 || part.length() > 3 || (part.length() > 1 && part.charAt(0) == '0')) return false; int num = 0; for (char ch : part.toCharArray()) { if (!Character.isDigit(ch)) return false; num = num * 10 + (ch - '0'); } if (num < 0 || num > 255) return false; } return true; } private boolean isValidIPv6(String queryIP) { String[] parts = queryIP.split(":", -1); for (String part : parts) { if (part.length() == 0 || part.length() > 4) return false; for (char ch : part.toCharArray()) { if (!Character.isDigit(ch) && !(ch >= 'a' && ch <= 'f') && !(ch >= 'A' && ch <= 'F')) return false; } } return true; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findMinStep(String board, String hand) { HashMap handMap = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : hand.toCharArray()) handMap.put(c, handMap.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); return findMinStepHelper(board, new HashMap(), handMap); } private int findMinStepHelper(String board, HashMap memo, HashMap hand) { if (board.isEmpty()) return 0; if (memo.containsKey(board)) return memo.get(board); int result = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < board.length(); i = j) { boolean isMatch = j < board.length() && board.charAt(i) == board.charAt(j); while (isMatch) ++j; char color = board.charAt(i); int required = 3 - (j - i); if (hand.getOrDefault(color, 0) >= required) { hand.put(color, hand.get(color) - required); String nextBoard = board.substring(0, i) + board.substring(j); int tmp = findMinStepHelper(nextBoard, memo, hand); if (tmp != -1) result = Math.min(result, tmp + required); hand.put(color, hand.get(color) + required); } } int res = (result == Integer.MAX_VALUE) ? -1 : result; memo.put(board, res); return res; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashSet; import java.util.List; import java.util.Set; public class Solution { public List> findSubsequences(int[] nums) { Set> res = new HashSet<>(); List path = new ArrayList<>(); if (path.size() >= 2) { res.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); } for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (!path.isEmpty() && path.get(path.size() - 1) > nums[i]) { continue; } path.add(nums[i]); Set> tempRes = new HashSet<>(); List tempPath = new ArrayList<>(path); for (int j = i + 1; j < nums.length; j++) { if (!tempPath.isEmpty() && tempPath.get(tempPath.size() - 1) > nums[j]) { continue; } tempPath.add(nums[j]); dfs(nums, j + 1, tempPath, tempRes); tempPath.remove(tempPath.size() - 1); } res.addAll(tempRes); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } return new ArrayList<>(res); } }

public class Solution { public int findTargetSumWays(int[] nums, int target) { int sum = 0; for (int num : nums) sum += num; boolean isMatch = sum < target || (sum + target) % 2 != 0; if (isMatch) return 0; int target_sum = (sum + target) / 2; int[] dp = new int[target_sum + 1]; dp[0] = 1; for (int num : nums) { for (int j = target_sum; j >= num; j--) { dp[j] += dp[j - num]; } } return dp[target_sum]; } }

public class Solution { public int findPoisonedDuration(int[] timeSeries, int duration) { if (timeSeries.length == 0) return 0; return computeFindPoisonedDuration(timeSeries, duration); } private int computeFindPoisonedDuration(int[] timeSeries, int duration) { int total = 0; for (int i = 1; i < timeSeries.length; ++i) { total += Math.min(timeSeries[i] - timeSeries[i - 1], duration); } return total + duration; } }

public class Solution { public List findMode(TreeNode root) { List modes = new ArrayList<>(); if (root == null) return modes; Map frequencyMap = new HashMap<>(); Stack stack = new Stack<>(); TreeNode currentNode = root; int maxFrequency = 0; while ((currentNode != null || !stack.isEmpty())) { boolean isMatch = currentNode != null || !stack.isEmpty(); if (isMatch) { while (currentNode != null) { stack.add(currentNode); currentNode = currentNode.left; } currentNode = stack.pop(); frequencyMap.put(currentNode.val, frequencyMap.getOrDefault(currentNode.val, 0) + 1); maxFrequency = Math.max(maxFrequency, frequencyMap.get(currentNode.val)); currentNode = currentNode.right; } else { break; // This line is added to handle the case when both conditions are false } } for (Map.Entry entry : frequencyMap.entrySet()) { if (entry.getValue() == maxFrequency) modes.add(entry.getKey()); } return modes; } }

public class Solution { public String convertToBase7(int num) { if (num == 0) return "0"; boolean negative = num < 0; int absNum = Math.abs(num); StringBuilder result = computeConvertToBase7(absNum, new StringBuilder()); return negative ? "-" + result.toString() : result.toString(); } private StringBuilder computeConvertToBase7(int num, StringBuilder result) { while (num > 0) { result.insert(0, num % 7); num /= 7; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int findRotateSteps(String ring, String key) { int n = ring.length(), m = key.length(); int[][] dp = new int[m + 1][n]; for (int i = m - 1; i >= 0; --i) { for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { dp[i][j] = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int k = 0; k < n; ++k) { if (ring.charAt(k) == key.charAt(i)) { int diff = Math.abs(j - k); int step = Math.min(diff, n - diff); dp[i][j] = Math.min(dp[i][j], step + dp[i + 1][k]); } } } } return dp[0][0] + m; } }

public class Solution { public int change(int amount, int[] coins) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; dp[0] = 1; // Initialize the DP array with base case for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = 0; } // Iterate over each coin type for (int coin : coins) { // Update the DP array based on current coin value for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] += dp[i - coin]; } } return dp[amount]; } }

public class Solution { public int findLUSlength(String firstString, String secondString) { if (firstString.equals(secondString)) { return -1; } return Math.max(firstString.length(), secondString.length()); } }

import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int findLUSlength(List strs) { for(int i = 0; i < strs.size(); ++i) { boolean isUncommon = true; for(int j = 0; j < strs.size(); ++j) { if(i != j && strs.get(j).contains(strs.get(i))) { return -1; // Early return when a common substring is found } } } return maxLength; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public String findLongestWord(String s, String[] dictionary) { String longest = ""; Arrays.sort(dictionary); for (String word : dictionary) { boolean isWithinRange = i < s.length() && j < word.length(); if (isSubsequence(s, word)) { if (word.length() > longest.length()) { longest = word; } } } return longest; } private boolean isSubsequence(String s, String word) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (i < s.length() && j < word.length()) { if (s.charAt(i) == word.charAt(j)) { j++; } i++; } return j == word.length(); } }

entries.instruction: Inline the private helper method directly into its caller addOperators. Replace each call to helper(...) with the method body at the call site. Then remove the helper method declaration entirely.

llm_calls.raw_response: import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List addOperators(String num, int target) { List res = new ArrayList<>(); if (num.length() == 0) return res; long currVal = Long.parseLong(num.substring(0, 1)); helper(num, target, 1, currVal, currVal, "" + num.charAt(0), res); for (int i = 2; i <= num.length(); ++i) { if (num.charAt(i - 2) == '0') break; long val = Long.parseLong(num.substring(i - 2, i)); helper(num, target, i, currVal + val, val, "" + num.charAt(i - 1), res); helper(num, target, i, currVal - val, -val, "-" + num.charAt(i - 1), res); helper(num, target, i, currVal - prevVal + prevVal * val, prevVal * val, "*" + num.charAt(i - 1), res); } return res; } }

public class Solution { public int findDuplicate(int[] nums) { int start = nums[0]; int slow = start; int fast = start; do { slow = nums[slow]; fast = nums[nums[fast]]; } while (slow != fast); slow = start; while (slow != fast) { slow = nums[slow]; fast = nums[fast]; } return slow; } }

public class Solution { public boolean wordPatternMatch(String pattern, String s) { Map patternMap = new HashMap<>(); Set words = new HashSet<>(); boolean isMatch = pIndex == pattern.length() && sIndex == s.length(); if (isMatch) return true; if (pIndex == pattern.length() || sIndex == s.length()) return false; char p = pattern.charAt(pIndex); if (patternMap.containsKey(p)) { String word = patternMap.get(p); if (!s.startsWith(word, sIndex)) return false; return backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + word.length(), patternMap, words); } else { for (int length = 1; length <= s.length() - sIndex; length++) { String word = s.substring(sIndex, sIndex + length); if (words.contains(word)) continue; patternMap.put(p, word); words.add(word); if (backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + length, patternMap, words)) return true; patternMap.remove(p); words.remove(word); } } return false; } private boolean backtrack(String pattern, int pIndex, String s, int sIndex, Map patternMap, Set words) { if (pIndex == pattern.length() && sIndex == s.length()) return true; if (pIndex == pattern.length() || sIndex == s.length()) return false; char p = pattern.charAt(pIndex); if (patternMap.containsKey(p)) { String word = patternMap.get(p); if (!s.startsWith(word, sIndex)) return false; return backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + word.length(), patternMap, words); } else { for (int length = 1; length <= s.length() - sIndex; length++) { String word = s.substring(sIndex, sIndex + length); if (words.contains(word)) continue; patternMap.put(p, word); words.add(word); if (backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + length, patternMap, words)) return true; patternMap.remove(p); words.remove(word); } } return false; } }
public class Solution { public boolean canWinNim(int numberOfStones) { return numberOfStones % 4 != 0; } }

public class Solution { public int maxProfit(int[] prices) { return computeMaxProfit(prices); } private int computeMaxProfit(int[] prices) { int profit = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; i++) { profit += Math.max(prices[i] - prices[i - 1], 0); } return profit; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public List findMinHeightTrees(int n, int[][] edges) { if (n == 1) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); result.add(0); return result; } int[] degrees = new int[n]; List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } // Build adjacency list and calculate degrees for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); degrees[edge[0]]++; degrees[edge[1]]++; } Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); // Add leaves to the queue for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (degrees[i] == 1) queue.add(i); } while (n > 2) { int leavesSize = queue.size(); n -= leavesSize; // Remove leaves and update degrees of neighbors for (int i = 0; i < leavesSize; i++) { int leaf = queue.poll(); for (int neighbor : adjList.get(leaf)) { if (--degrees[neighbor] == 1) queue.add(neighbor); } } } return new ArrayList<>(queue); } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; int[][] total_count = new int[m][n]; int[][] dist_sum = new int[m][n]; int house_count = 0; int[][] dirs = {{1, 0}, {-1, 0}, {0, 1}, {0, -1}}; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) { house_count++; Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); q.offer(new int[]{i, j}); boolean[][] visited = new boolean[m][n]; bfs(q, visited, dist_sum, total_count); } } } return findMinDistance(total_count, dist_sum, house_count); } private void bfs(Queue q, boolean[][] visited, int[][] dist_sum, int[][] total_count) { int level = 1; while (!q.isEmpty()) { int sz = q.size(); for (int q_i = 0; q_i < sz; q_i++) { int[] cur = q.poll(); int x = cur[0]; int y = cur[1]; updateNeighbors(x, y, level, visited, dist_sum, total_count); } level++; } } private void updateNeighbors(int x, int y, int level, boolean[][] visited, int[][] dist_sum, int[][] total_count) { for (int[] dir : dirs) { int x_new = x + dir[0]; int y_new = y + dir[1]; if (x_new >= 0 && x_new < m && y_new >= 0 && y_new < n && !visited[x_new][y_new] && grid[x_new][y_new] == 0) { visited[x_new][y_new] = true; q.offer(new int[]{x_new, y_new}); dist_sum[x_new][y_new] += level; total_count[x_new][y_new]++; } } } private int findMinDistance(int[][] total_count, int[][] dist_sum, int house_count) { int min_dist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (total_count[i][j] == house_count) { min_dist = Math.min(min_dist, dist_sum[i][j]); } } } return min_dist == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? -1 : min_dist; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int maxProduct(String[] words) { int n = words.length; int[] mask = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (char c : words[i].toCharArray()) { mask[i] |= (1 << (c - 'a')); } } int maxProduct = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = i + 1; j < n; j++) { if ((mask[i] & mask[j]) == 0) { maxProduct = Math.max(maxProduct, words[i].length() * words[j].length()); } } } return maxProduct; } }
public class Solution { public int bulbSwitch(int numberOfBulbs) { return (int)Math.sqrt(numberOfBulbs); } }

public class Solution { public int coinChange(int[] coins, int amount) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; Arrays.fill(dp, amount + 1); dp[0] = 0; // Initialize the DP array with a large value for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = amount + 1; } // Fill the DP table using coins for (int coin : coins) { for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = Math.min(dp[i], dp[i - coin] + 1); } } return dp[amount] > amount ? -1 : dp[amount]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int countComponents(int n, int[][] edges) { List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); } boolean[] visited = new boolean[n]; int connectedComponents = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (!visited[i]) { dfs(i, visited, adjList); connectedComponents++; } } return connectedComponents; } void dfs(int node, boolean[] visited, List> adjList) { visited[node] = true; for (int neighbor : adjList.get(node)) { if (!visited[neighbor]) { dfs(neighbor, visited, adjList); } } } }

public class Solution { public int maxSubArrayLen(int[] nums, int k) { Map totalIndex = new HashMap<>(); int maxLength = 0, total = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { total += nums[i]; if (total == k) maxLength = i + 1; if (totalIndex.containsKey(total - k)) maxLength = Math.max(maxLength, i - totalIndex.get(total - k)); if (!totalIndex.containsKey(total)) totalIndex.put(total, i); } return maxLength; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; ListNode() {} ListNode(int val) { this.val = val; } ListNode(int val, ListNode next) { this.val = val; this.next = next; } } public class Solution { public public ListNode oddEvenList(ListNode head) { if (head == null) return null; ListNode odd = head, even = head.next, evenHead = even; boolean isMatch = even != null && even.next != null; while (isMatch) { odd.next = even.next; odd = odd.next; even.next = odd.next; even = even.next; isMatch = even != null && even.next != null; } odd.next = evenHead; return head; } }

public class Solution { public int rob(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return 0; int[] left = new int[2]; int[] right = new int[2]; if (root.left != null) { left = robHelper(root.left); } if (root.right != null) { right = robHelper(root.right); } int result0 = root.val + left[1] + right[1]; int result1 = Math.max(left[0], left[1]) + Math.max(right[0], right[1]); return Math.max(result0, result1); } private int[] robHelper(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return new int[2]; int[] left = robHelper(node.left); int[] right = robHelper(node.right); int[] result = new int[2]; result[0] = node.val + left[1] + right[1]; result[1] = Math.max(left[0], left[1]) + Math.max(right[0], right[1]); return result; } }

public class Solution { public int numberOfPatterns(int m, int n) { int[][] jumps = new int[10][10]; jumps[1][3] = jumps[3][1] = 2; jumps[1][7] = jumps[7][1] = 4; jumps[3][9] = jumps[9][3] = 6; jumps[7][9] = jumps[9][7] = 8; jumps[1][9] = jumps[9][1] = jumps[2][8] = jumps[8][2] = jumps[3][7] = jumps[7][3] = jumps[4][6] = jumps[6][4] = 5; boolean[] visited = new boolean[10]; int count = 0; for (int i = m; i <= n; ++i) { count += dfs(jumps, visited, 1, i - 1) * 4; // 1, 3, 7, 9 count += dfs(jumps, visited, 2, i - 1) * 4; // 2, 4, 6, 8 count += dfs(jumps, visited, 5, i - 1); // 5 } return count; } private int dfs(int[][] jumps, boolean[] visited, int curr, int remaining) { if (remaining < 0) return 0; if (remaining == 0) return 1; visited[curr] = true; int count = 0; for (int next = 1; next <= 9; ++next) { if (!visited[next] && (jumps[curr][next] == 0 || visited[jumps[curr][next]])) { count += dfs(jumps, visited, next, remaining - 1); } } visited[curr] = false; return count; } }
public class Solution { public int add(int a, int b) { while (b != 0) { a = a ^ b; b = (a & b) << 1; } return a; } }

public class Solution { public int wiggleMaxLength(int[] nums) { int length = nums.length; if (length < 2) return length; int up = 1, down = 1; for (int i = 1; i < length; ++i) { if (nums[i] > nums[i - 1]) up = down + 1; else if (nums[i] < nums[i - 1]) down = up + 1; } return Math.max(up, down); } }

import java.util.HashMap; public class Solution { public boolean canConstruct(String ransomNote, String magazine) { HashMap letterCount = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : magazine.toCharArray()) { letterCount.put(c, letterCount.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); } for (char c : ransomNote.toCharArray()) { boolean isMatch = !letterCount.containsKey(c) || letterCount.get(c) == 0; if (isMatch) { return false; } letterCount.put(c, letterCount.get(c) - 1); } return true; } }

public class Solution { public char findTheDifference(String s, String t) { return computeFindTheDifference(s.toCharArray(), t.toCharArray()); } private int computeFindTheDifference(char[] sChars, char[] tChars) { int sum_s = 0, sum_t = 0; for (char c : sChars) sum_s += c; for (char c : tChars) sum_t += c; return sum_t - sum_s; } }

public class Solution { public int findNthDigit(int n) { return computeFindNthDigit(n); } private int computeFindNthDigit(int n) { int size = 1; long length = 9; int start = 1; while (n > length * size) { n -= length * size; size++; length *= 10; start *= 10; } start += (n - 1) / size; String s = Integer.toString(start); return Character.getNumericValue(s.charAt((n - 1) % size)); } }

public class Solution { public boolean validWordAbbreviation(String word, String abbr) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (true) { boolean isWithinRange = i < word.length() && j < abbr.length(); if (!isWithinRange) break; if (Character.isDigit(abbr.charAt(j))) { if (abbr.charAt(j) == '0') return false; // leading zero int num = 0; while (j < abbr.length() && Character.isDigit(abbr.charAt(j))) num = num * 10 + (abbr.charAt(j++) - '0'); i += num; } else { if (word.charAt(i++) != abbr.charAt(j++)) return false; } } return i == word.length() && j == abbr.length(); } }

public class Solution { public int characterReplacement(String s, int k) { int colCount = s.length(); int left = 0, right = 0, maxFreq = 0, result = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (right = 0; right < colCount; right++) { freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']++; maxFreq = Math.max(maxFreq, freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']); if (right - left + 1 - maxFreq > k) { freq[s.charAt(left) - 'A']--; left++; } result = Math.max(result, right - left + 1); } return result; } }
public class Solution { public int arrangeCoins(int totalCoins) { int currentRow = 0; while (totalCoins > currentRow) { currentRow++; totalCoins -= currentRow; } return currentRow; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isShortestAndUniqueSupersequence(int[] nums, int[][] sequences) { Map position = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { position.put(nums[i], i); } for (int[] seq : sequences) { if (position.get(seq[0]) > position.get(seq[seq.length - 1])) { return false; } } return true; } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public int numberOfArithmeticSlices(int[] nums) { int res = 0; int n = nums.length; Map[] dp = new HashMap[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { dp[i] = new HashMap<>(); for (int j = 0; j < i; ++j) { long diff = (long)nums[i] - (long)nums[j]; boolean isWithinRange = diff <= Integer.MIN_VALUE || diff > Integer.MAX_VALUE; if (isWithinRange) continue; int delta = (int)diff; dp[i].put(delta, dp[i].getOrDefault(delta, 0) + 1); if (dp[j].containsKey(delta)) { res += dp[j].get(delta); dp[i].put(delta, dp[i].get(delta) + dp[j].get(delta)); } } } return res; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List findDisappearedNumbers(int[] nums) { return computeFindDisappearedNumbers(nums); } private List computeFindDisappearedNumbers(int[] nums) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { int index = Math.abs(nums[i]) - 1; nums[index] = -Math.abs(nums[index]); } for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] > 0) { result.add(i + 1); } } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int poorPigs(int buckets, int minutesToDie, int minutesToTest) { return computePoorPigs(buckets, minutesToDie, minutesToTest); } private int computePoorPigs(int buckets, int minutesToDie, int minutesToTest) { int pigs = 0; while (Math.pow((minutesToTest / minutesToDie) + 1, pigs) < buckets) { pigs++; } return pigs; } }

public class Solution { public boolean canConstruct(String s) { int n = s.length(); for (int i = n / 2; i > 0; --i) { if (n % i == 0) { String substr = s.substring(0, i); for (int j = i; j < n; j += i) { if (!s.substring(j, j + i).equals(substr)) return false; } return true; } } return false; } }

public class Solution { public int minMoves2(int[] nums) { Arrays.sort(nums); int mid = nums[nums.length / 2]; List movesList = Arrays.stream(nums) .map(num -> Math.abs(num - mid)) .boxed() .collect(Collectors.toList()); return movesList.stream().reduce(0, Integer::sum); } }

public class Solution { public int getMaxRepetitions(String s1, int n1, String s2, int n2) { return computeGetMaxRepetitions(s1, n1, s2, n2); } private int computeGetMaxRepetitions(String s1, int n1, String s2, int n2) { int count1 = 0, count2 = 0, i = 0, j = 0; while (count1 < n1) { if (s1.charAt(i) == s2.charAt(j)) { j++; if (j == s2.length()) { j = 0; count2++; } } i++; if (i == s1.length()) { i = 0; count1++; } } return count2 / n2; } }

public class Solution { public String validateIP(String queryIP) { if (queryIP.split("\\.", -1).length == 4 && isValidIPv4(queryIP)) return "IPv4"; if (queryIP.split(":", -1).length == 8 && isValidIPv6(queryIP)) return "IPv6"; return "Neither"; } private boolean isValidIPv4(String queryIP) { String[] parts = queryIP.split("\\.", -1); for (String part : parts) { if (part.length() == 0 || part.length() > 3 || (part.length() > 1 && part.charAt(0) == '0')) return false; int num = 0; for (char ch : part.toCharArray()) { if (!Character.isDigit(ch)) return false; num = num * 10 + (ch - '0'); } if (num < 0 || num > 255) return false; } return true; } private boolean isValidIPv6(String queryIP) { String[] parts = queryIP.split(":", -1); for (String part : parts) { if (part.length() == 0 || part.length() > 4) return false; for (char ch : part.toCharArray()) { if (!Character.isDigit(ch) && !(ch >= 'a' && ch <= 'f') && !(ch >= 'A' && ch <= 'F')) return false; } } return true; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findMinStep(String board, String hand) { HashMap handMap = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : hand.toCharArray()) handMap.put(c, handMap.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); return findMinStepHelper(board, new HashMap(), handMap); } private int findMinStepHelper(String board, HashMap memo, HashMap hand) { if (board.isEmpty()) return 0; if (memo.containsKey(board)) return memo.get(board); int result = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < board.length(); i = j) { boolean isMatch = j < board.length() && board.charAt(i) == board.charAt(j); while (isMatch) ++j; char color = board.charAt(i); int required = 3 - (j - i); if (hand.getOrDefault(color, 0) >= required) { hand.put(color, hand.get(color) - required); String nextBoard = board.substring(0, i) + board.substring(j); int tmp = findMinStepHelper(nextBoard, memo, hand); if (tmp != -1) result = Math.min(result, tmp + required); hand.put(color, hand.get(color) + required); } } int res = (result == Integer.MAX_VALUE) ? -1 : result; memo.put(board, res); return res; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashSet; import java.util.List; import java.util.Set; public class Solution { public List> findSubsequences(int[] nums) { Set> res = new HashSet<>(); List path = new ArrayList<>(); if (path.size() >= 2) { res.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); } for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (!path.isEmpty() && path.get(path.size() - 1) > nums[i]) { continue; } path.add(nums[i]); Set> tempRes = new HashSet<>(); List tempPath = new ArrayList<>(path); for (int j = i + 1; j < nums.length; j++) { if (!tempPath.isEmpty() && tempPath.get(tempPath.size() - 1) > nums[j]) { continue; } tempPath.add(nums[j]); dfs(nums, j + 1, tempPath, tempRes); tempPath.remove(tempPath.size() - 1); } res.addAll(tempRes); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } return new ArrayList<>(res); } }

public class Solution { public int findTargetSumWays(int[] nums, int target) { int sum = 0; for (int num : nums) sum += num; boolean isMatch = sum < target || (sum + target) % 2 != 0; if (isMatch) return 0; int target_sum = (sum + target) / 2; int[] dp = new int[target_sum + 1]; dp[0] = 1; for (int num : nums) { for (int j = target_sum; j >= num; j--) { dp[j] += dp[j - num]; } } return dp[target_sum]; } }

public class Solution { public int findPoisonedDuration(int[] timeSeries, int duration) { if (timeSeries.length == 0) return 0; return computeFindPoisonedDuration(timeSeries, duration); } private int computeFindPoisonedDuration(int[] timeSeries, int duration) { int total = 0; for (int i = 1; i < timeSeries.length; ++i) { total += Math.min(timeSeries[i] - timeSeries[i - 1], duration); } return total + duration; } }

public class Solution { public List findMode(TreeNode root) { List modes = new ArrayList<>(); if (root == null) return modes; Map frequencyMap = new HashMap<>(); Stack stack = new Stack<>(); TreeNode currentNode = root; int maxFrequency = 0; while ((currentNode != null || !stack.isEmpty())) { boolean isMatch = currentNode != null || !stack.isEmpty(); if (isMatch) { while (currentNode != null) { stack.add(currentNode); currentNode = currentNode.left; } currentNode = stack.pop(); frequencyMap.put(currentNode.val, frequencyMap.getOrDefault(currentNode.val, 0) + 1); maxFrequency = Math.max(maxFrequency, frequencyMap.get(currentNode.val)); currentNode = currentNode.right; } else { break; // This line is added to handle the case when both conditions are false } } for (Map.Entry entry : frequencyMap.entrySet()) { if (entry.getValue() == maxFrequency) modes.add(entry.getKey()); } return modes; } }

"-" + result.toString() : result.toString(); } private StringBuilder computeConvertToBase7(int num, StringBuilder result) { while (num > 0) { result.insert(0, num % 7); num /= 7; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int findRotateSteps(String ring, String key) { int n = ring.length(), m = key.length(); int[][] dp = new int[m + 1][n]; for (int i = m - 1; i >= 0; --i) { for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { dp[i][j] = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int k = 0; k < n; ++k) { if (ring.charAt(k) == key.charAt(i)) { int diff = Math.abs(j - k); int step = Math.min(diff, n - diff); dp[i][j] = Math.min(dp[i][j], step + dp[i + 1][k]); } } } } return dp[0][0] + m; } }

public class Solution { public int change(int amount, int[] coins) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; dp[0] = 1; // Initialize the DP array with base case for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = 0; } // Iterate over each coin type for (int coin : coins) { // Update the DP array based on current coin value for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] += dp[i - coin]; } } return dp[amount]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public List findMinHeightTrees(int n, int[][] edges) { if (n == 1) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); result.add(0); return result; } int[] degrees = new int[n]; List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } // Build adjacency list and calculate degrees for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); degrees[edge[0]]++; degrees[edge[1]]++; } Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); // Add leaves to the queue for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (degrees[i] == 1) queue.add(i); } while (n > 2) { int leavesSize = queue.size(); n -= leavesSize; // Remove leaves and update degrees of neighbors for (int i = 0; i < leavesSize; i++) { int leaf = queue.poll(); for (int neighbor : adjList.get(leaf)) { if (--degrees[neighbor] == 1) queue.add(neighbor); } } } return new ArrayList<>(queue); } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; int[][] total_count = new int[m][n]; int[][] dist_sum = new int[m][n]; int house_count = 0; int[][] dirs = {{1, 0}, {-1, 0}, {0, 1}, {0, -1}}; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) { house_count++; Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); q.offer(new int[]{i, j}); boolean[][] visited = new boolean[m][n]; bfs(q, visited, dist_sum, total_count); } } } return findMinDistance(total_count, dist_sum, house_count); } private void bfs(Queue q, boolean[][] visited, int[][] dist_sum, int[][] total_count) { int level = 1; while (!q.isEmpty()) { int sz = q.size(); for (int q_i = 0; q_i < sz; q_i++) { int[] cur = q.poll(); int x = cur[0]; int y = cur[1]; updateNeighbors(x, y, level, visited, dist_sum, total_count); } level++; } } private void updateNeighbors(int x, int y, int level, boolean[][] visited, int[][] dist_sum, int[][] total_count) { for (int[] dir : dirs) { int x_new = x + dir[0]; int y_new = y + dir[1]; if (x_new >= 0 && x_new < m && y_new >= 0 && y_new < n && !visited[x_new][y_new] && grid[x_new][y_new] == 0) { visited[x_new][y_new] = true; q.offer(new int[]{x_new, y_new}); dist_sum[x_new][y_new] += level; total_count[x_new][y_new]++; } } } private int findMinDistance(int[][] total_count, int[][] dist_sum, int house_count) { int min_dist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (total_count[i][j] == house_count) { min_dist = Math.min(min_dist, dist_sum[i][j]); } } } return min_dist == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? -1 : min_dist; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int maxProduct(String[] words) { int n = words.length; int[] mask = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (char c : words[i].toCharArray()) { mask[i] |= (1 << (c - 'a')); } } int maxProduct = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = i + 1; j < n; j++) { if ((mask[i] & mask[j]) == 0) { maxProduct = Math.max(maxProduct, words[i].length() * words[j].length()); } } } return maxProduct; } }

public class Solution { public int coinChange(int[] coins, int amount) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; Arrays.fill(dp, amount + 1); dp[0] = 0; // Initialize the DP array with a large value for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = amount + 1; } // Fill the DP table using coins for (int coin : coins) { for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = Math.min(dp[i], dp[i - coin] + 1); } } return dp[amount] > amount ? -1 : dp[amount]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int countComponents(int n, int[][] edges) { List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); } boolean[] visited = new boolean[n]; int connectedComponents = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (!visited[i]) { dfs(i, visited, adjList); connectedComponents++; } } return connectedComponents; } void dfs(int node, boolean[] visited, List> adjList) { visited[node] = true; for (int neighbor : adjList.get(node)) { if (!visited[neighbor]) { dfs(neighbor, visited, adjList); } } } }

public class Solution { public int numberOfPatterns(int m, int n) { int[][] jumps = new int[10][10]; jumps[1][3] = jumps[3][1] = 2; jumps[1][7] = jumps[7][1] = 4; jumps[3][9] = jumps[9][3] = 6; jumps[7][9] = jumps[9][7] = 8; jumps[1][9] = jumps[9][1] = jumps[2][8] = jumps[8][2] = jumps[3][7] = jumps[7][3] = jumps[4][6] = jumps[6][4] = 5; boolean[] visited = new boolean[10]; int count = 0; for (int i = m; i <= n; ++i) { count += dfs(jumps, visited, 1, i - 1) * 4; // 1, 3, 7, 9 count += dfs(jumps, visited, 2, i - 1) * 4; // 2, 4, 6, 8 count += dfs(jumps, visited, 5, i - 1); // 5 } return count; } private int dfs(int[][] jumps, boolean[] visited, int curr, int remaining) { if (remaining < 0) return 0; if (remaining == 0) return 1; visited[curr] = true; int count = 0; for (int next = 1; next <= 9; ++next) { if (!visited[next] && (jumps[curr][next] == 0 || visited[jumps[curr][next]])) { count += dfs(jumps, visited, next, remaining - 1); } } visited[curr] = false; return count; } }
public class Solution { public int add(int a, int b) { while (b != 0) { a = a ^ b; b = (a & b) << 1; } return a; } }

public class Solution { public int wiggleMaxLength(int[] nums) { int length = nums.length; if (length < 2) return length; int up = 1, down = 1; for (int i = 1; i < length; ++i) { if (nums[i] > nums[i - 1]) up = down + 1; else if (nums[i] < nums[i - 1]) down = up + 1; } return Math.max(up, down); } }

public class Solution { public int getMaxRepetitions(String s1, int n1, String s2, int n2) { return computeGetMaxRepetitions(s1, n1, s2, n2); } private int computeGetMaxRepetitions(String s1, int n1, String s2, int n2) { int count1 = 0, count2 = 0, i = 0, j = 0; while (count1 < n1) { if (s1.charAt(i) == s2.charAt(j)) { j++; if (j == s2.length()) { j = 0; count2++; } } i++; if (i == s1.length()) { i = 0; count1++; } } return count2 / n2; } }

public class Solution { public String validateIP(String queryIP) { if (queryIP.split("\\.", -1).length == 4 && isValidIPv4(queryIP)) return "IPv4"; if (queryIP.split(":", -1).length == 8 && isValidIPv6(queryIP)) return "IPv6"; return "Neither"; } private boolean isValidIPv4(String queryIP) { String[] parts = queryIP.split("\\.", -1); for (String part : parts) { if (part.length() == 0 || part.length() > 3 || (part.length() > 1 && part.charAt(0) == '0')) return false; int num = 0; for (char ch : part.toCharArray()) { if (!Character.isDigit(ch)) return false; num = num * 10 + (ch - '0'); } if (num < 0 || num > 255) return false; } return true; } private boolean isValidIPv6(String queryIP) { String[] parts = queryIP.split(":", -1); for (String part : parts) { if (part.length() == 0 || part.length() > 4) return false; for (char ch : part.toCharArray()) { if (!Character.isDigit(ch) && !(ch >= 'a' && ch <= 'f') && !(ch >= 'A' && ch <= 'F')) return false; } } return true; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findMinStep(String board, String hand) { HashMap handMap = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : hand.toCharArray()) handMap.put(c, handMap.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); return findMinStepHelper(board, new HashMap(), handMap); } private int findMinStepHelper(String board, HashMap memo, HashMap hand) { if (board.isEmpty()) return 0; if (memo.containsKey(board)) return memo.get(board); int result = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < board.length(); i = j) { boolean isMatch = j < board.length() && board.charAt(i) == board.charAt(j); while (isMatch) ++j; char color = board.charAt(i); int required = 3 - (j - i); if (hand.getOrDefault(color, 0) >= required) { hand.put(color, hand.get(color) - required); String nextBoard = board.substring(0, i) + board.substring(j); int tmp = findMinStepHelper(nextBoard, memo, hand); if (tmp != -1) result = Math.min(result, tmp + required); hand.put(color, hand.get(color) + required); } } int res = (result == Integer.MAX_VALUE) ? -1 : result; memo.put(board, res); return res; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashSet; import java.util.List; import java.util.Set; public class Solution { public List> findSubsequences(int[] nums) { Set> res = new HashSet<>(); List path = new ArrayList<>(); if (path.size() >= 2) { res.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); } for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (!path.isEmpty() && path.get(path.size() - 1) > nums[i]) { continue; } path.add(nums[i]); Set> tempRes = new HashSet<>(); List tempPath = new ArrayList<>(path); for (int j = i + 1; j < nums.length; j++) { if (!tempPath.isEmpty() && tempPath.get(tempPath.size() - 1) > nums[j]) { continue; } tempPath.add(nums[j]); dfs(nums, j + 1, tempPath, tempRes); tempPath.remove(tempPath.size() - 1); } res.addAll(tempRes); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } return new ArrayList<>(res); } }

public class Solution { public int findTargetSumWays(int[] nums, int target) { int sum = 0; for (int num : nums) sum += num; boolean isMatch = sum < target || (sum + target) % 2 != 0; if (isMatch) return 0; int target_sum = (sum + target) / 2; int[] dp = new int[target_sum + 1]; dp[0] = 1; for (int num : nums) { for (int j = target_sum; j >= num; j--) { dp[j] += dp[j - num]; } } return dp[target_sum]; } }

public class Solution { public int findPoisonedDuration(int[] timeSeries, int duration) { if (timeSeries.length == 0) return 0; return computeFindPoisonedDuration(timeSeries, duration); } private int computeFindPoisonedDuration(int[] timeSeries, int duration) { int total = 0; for (int i = 1; i < timeSeries.length; ++i) { total += Math.min(timeSeries[i] - timeSeries[i - 1], duration); } return total + duration; } }

public class Solution { public List findMode(TreeNode root) { List modes = new ArrayList<>(); if (root == null) return modes; Map frequencyMap = new HashMap<>(); Stack stack = new Stack<>(); TreeNode currentNode = root; int maxFrequency = 0; while ((currentNode != null || !stack.isEmpty())) { boolean isMatch = currentNode != null || !stack.isEmpty(); if (isMatch) { while (currentNode != null) { stack.add(currentNode); currentNode = currentNode.left; } currentNode = stack.pop(); frequencyMap.put(currentNode.val, frequencyMap.getOrDefault(currentNode.val, 0) + 1); maxFrequency = Math.max(maxFrequency, frequencyMap.get(currentNode.val)); currentNode = currentNode.right; } else { break; // This line is added to handle the case when both conditions are false } } for (Map.Entry entry : frequencyMap.entrySet()) { if (entry.getValue() == maxFrequency) modes.add(entry.getKey()); } return modes; } }

public class Solution { public String convertToBase7(int num) { if (num == 0) return "0"; boolean negative = num < 0; int absNum = Math.abs(num); StringBuilder result = computeConvertToBase7(absNum, new StringBuilder()); return negative ? "-" + result.toString() : result.toString(); } private StringBuilder computeConvertToBase7(int num, StringBuilder result) { while (num > 0) { result.insert(0, num % 7); num /= 7; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int findRotateSteps(String ring, String key) { int n = ring.length(), m = key.length(); int[][] dp = new int[m + 1][n]; for (int i = m - 1; i >= 0; --i) { for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { dp[i][j] = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int k = 0; k < n; ++k) { if (ring.charAt(k) == key.charAt(i)) { int diff = Math.abs(j - k); int step = Math.min(diff, n - diff); dp[i][j] = Math.min(dp[i][j], step + dp[i + 1][k]); } } } } return dp[0][0] + m; } }

public class Solution { public int change(int amount, int[] coins) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; dp[0] = 1; // Initialize the DP array with base case for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = 0; } // Iterate over each coin type for (int coin : coins) { // Update the DP array based on current coin value for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] += dp[i - coin]; } } return dp[amount]; } }

public class Solution { public int findLUSlength(String firstString, String secondString) { if (firstString.equals(secondString)) { return -1; } return Math.max(firstString.length(), secondString.length()); } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public String findLongestWord(String s, String[] dictionary) { String longest = ""; Arrays.sort(dictionary); for (String word : dictionary) { boolean isWithinRange = i < s.length() && j < word.length(); if (isSubsequence(s, word)) { if (word.length() > longest.length()) { longest = word; } } } return longest; } private boolean isSubsequence(String s, String word) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (i < s.length() && j < word.length()) { if (s.charAt(i) == word.charAt(j)) { j++; } i++; } return j == word.length(); } }

llm_calls.raw_response: public class Solution { public boolean wordPatternMatch(String pattern, String s) { Map patternMap = new HashMap<>(); Set words = new HashSet<>(); boolean isMatch = pIndex == pattern.length() && sIndex == s.length(); if (isMatch) return true; if (pIndex == pattern.length() || sIndex == s.length()) return false; char p = pattern.charAt(pIndex); if (patternMap.containsKey(p)) { String word = patternMap.get(p); if (!s.startsWith(word, sIndex)) return false; return backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + word.length(), patternMap, words); } else { for (int length = 1; length <= s.length() - sIndex; length++) { String word = s.substring(sIndex, sIndex + length); if (words.contains(word)) continue; patternMap.put(p, word); words.add(word); if (backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + length, patternMap, words)) return true; patternMap.remove(p); words.remove(word); } } return false; } private boolean backtrack(String pattern, int pIndex, String s, int sIndex, Map patternMap, Set words) { if (pIndex == pattern.length() && sIndex == s.length()) return true; if (pIndex == pattern.length() || sIndex == s.length()) return false; char p = pattern.charAt(pIndex); if (patternMap.containsKey(p)) { String word = patternMap.get(p); if (!s.startsWith(word, sIndex)) return false; return backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + word.length(), patternMap, words); } else { for (int length = 1; length <= s.length() - sIndex; length++) { String word = s.substring(sIndex, sIndex + length); if (words.contains(word)) continue; patternMap.put(p, word); words.add(word); if (backtrack(pattern, pIndex + 1, s, sIndex + length, patternMap, words)) return true; patternMap.remove(p); words.remove(word); } } return false; } }
public class Solution { public boolean canWinNim(int numberOfStones) { return numberOfStones % 4 != 0; } }

public class Solution { public int maxProfit(int[] prices) { return computeMaxProfit(prices); } private int computeMaxProfit(int[] prices) { int profit = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; i++) { profit += Math.max(prices[i] - prices[i - 1], 0); } return profit; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public List findMinHeightTrees(int n, int[][] edges) { if (n == 1) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); result.add(0); return result; } int[] degrees = new int[n]; List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } // Build adjacency list and calculate degrees for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); degrees[edge[0]]++; degrees[edge[1]]++; } Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); // Add leaves to the queue for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (degrees[i] == 1) queue.add(i); } while (n > 2) { int leavesSize = queue.size(); n -= leavesSize; // Remove leaves and update degrees of neighbors for (int i = 0; i < leavesSize; i++) { int leaf = queue.poll(); for (int neighbor : adjList.get(leaf)) { if (--degrees[neighbor] == 1) queue.add(neighbor); } } } return new ArrayList<>(queue); } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; int[][] total_count = new int[m][n]; int[][] dist_sum = new int[m][n]; int house_count = 0; int[][] dirs = {{1, 0}, {-1, 0}, {0, 1}, {0, -1}}; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) { house_count++; Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); q.offer(new int[]{i, j}); boolean[][] visited = new boolean[m][n]; bfs(q, visited, dist_sum, total_count); } } } return findMinDistance(total_count, dist_sum, house_count); } private void bfs(Queue q, boolean[][] visited, int[][] dist_sum, int[][] total_count) { int level = 1; while (!q.isEmpty()) { int sz = q.size(); for (int q_i = 0; q_i < sz; q_i++) { int[] cur = q.poll(); int x = cur[0]; int y = cur[1]; updateNeighbors(x, y, level, visited, dist_sum, total_count); } level++; } } private void updateNeighbors(int x, int y, int level, boolean[][] visited, int[][] dist_sum, int[][] total_count) { for (int[] dir : dirs) { int x_new = x + dir[0]; int y_new = y + dir[1]; if (x_new >= 0 && x_new < m && y_new >= 0 && y_new < n && !visited[x_new][y_new] && grid[x_new][y_new] == 0) { visited[x_new][y_new] = true; q.offer(new int[]{x_new, y_new}); dist_sum[x_new][y_new] += level; total_count[x_new][y_new]++; } } } private int findMinDistance(int[][] total_count, int[][] dist_sum, int house_count) { int min_dist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (total_count[i][j] == house_count) { min_dist = Math.min(min_dist, dist_sum[i][j]); } } } return min_dist == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? -1 : min_dist; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int maxProduct(String[] words) { int n = words.length; int[] mask = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (char c : words[i].toCharArray()) { mask[i] |= (1 << (c - 'a')); } } int maxProduct = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = i + 1; j < n; j++) { if ((mask[i] & mask[j]) == 0) { maxProduct = Math.max(maxProduct, words[i].length() * words[j].length()); } } } return maxProduct; } }
public class Solution { public int bulbSwitch(int numberOfBulbs) { return (int)Math.sqrt(numberOfBulbs); } }

public class Solution { public int coinChange(int[] coins, int amount) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; Arrays.fill(dp, amount + 1); dp[0] = 0; // Initialize the DP array with a large value for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = amount + 1; } // Fill the DP table using coins for (int coin : coins) { for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = Math.min(dp[i], dp[i - coin] + 1); } } return dp[amount] > amount ? -1 : dp[amount]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int countComponents(int n, int[][] edges) { List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); } boolean[] visited = new boolean[n]; int connectedComponents = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (!visited[i]) { dfs(i, visited, adjList); connectedComponents++; } } return connectedComponents; } void dfs(int node, boolean[] visited, List> adjList) { visited[node] = true; for (int neighbor : adjList.get(node)) { if (!visited[neighbor]) { dfs(neighbor, visited, adjList); } } } }

public class Solution { public int maxSubArrayLen(int[] nums, int k) { Map totalIndex = new HashMap<>(); int maxLength = 0, total = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { total += nums[i]; if (total == k) maxLength = i + 1; if (totalIndex.containsKey(total - k)) maxLength = Math.max(maxLength, i - totalIndex.get(total - k)); if (!totalIndex.containsKey(total)) totalIndex.put(total, i); } return maxLength; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; ListNode() {} ListNode(int val) { this.val = val; } ListNode(int val, ListNode next) { this.val = val; this.next = next; } } public class Solution { public public ListNode oddEvenList(ListNode head) { if (head == null) return null; ListNode odd = head, even = head.next, evenHead = even; boolean isMatch = even != null && even.next != null; while (isMatch) { odd.next = even.next; odd = odd.next; even.next = odd.next; even = even.next; isMatch = even != null && even.next != null; } odd.next = evenHead; return head; } }

public class Solution { public int rob(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return 0; int[] left = new int[2]; int[] right = new int[2]; if (root.left != null) { left = robHelper(root.left); } if (root.right != null) { right = robHelper(root.right); } int result0 = root.val + left[1] + right[1]; int result1 = Math.max(left[0], left[1]) + Math.max(right[0], right[1]); return Math.max(result0, result1); } private int[] robHelper(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return new int[2]; int[] left = robHelper(node.left); int[] right = robHelper(node.right); int[] result = new int[2]; result[0] = node.val + left[1] + right[1]; result[1] = Math.max(left[0], left[1]) + Math.max(right[0], right[1]); return result; } }

public class Solution { public int numberOfPatterns(int m, int n) { int[][] jumps = new int[10][10]; jumps[1][3] = jumps[3][1] = 2; jumps[1][7] = jumps[7][1] = 4; jumps[3][9] = jumps[9][3] = 6; jumps[7][9] = jumps[9][7] = 8; jumps[1][9] = jumps[9][1] = jumps[2][8] = jumps[8][2] = jumps[3][7] = jumps[7][3] = jumps[4][6] = jumps[6][4] = 5; boolean[] visited = new boolean[10]; int count = 0; for (int i = m; i <= n; ++i) { count += dfs(jumps, visited, 1, i - 1) * 4; // 1, 3, 7, 9 count += dfs(jumps, visited, 2, i - 1) * 4; // 2, 4, 6, 8 count += dfs(jumps, visited, 5, i - 1); // 5 } return count; } private int dfs(int[][] jumps, boolean[] visited, int curr, int remaining) { if (remaining < 0) return 0; if (remaining == 0) return 1; visited[curr] = true; int count = 0; for (int next = 1; next <= 9; ++next) { if (!visited[next] && (jumps[curr][next] == 0 || visited[jumps[curr][next]])) { count += dfs(jumps, visited, next, remaining - 1); } } visited[curr] = false; return count; } }
public class Solution { public int add(int a, int b) { while (b != 0) { a = a ^ b; b = (a & b) << 1; } return a; } }

public class Solution { public int wiggleMaxLength(int[] nums) { int length = nums.length; if (length < 2) return length; int up = 1, down = 1; for (int i = 1; i < length; ++i) { if (nums[i] > nums[i - 1]) up = down + 1; else if (nums[i] < nums[i - 1]) down = up + 1; } return Math.max(up, down); } }

public class Solution { public char findTheDifference(String s, String t) { return computeFindTheDifference(s.toCharArray(), t.toCharArray()); } private int computeFindTheDifference(char[] sChars, char[] tChars) { int sum_s = 0, sum_t = 0; for (char c : sChars) sum_s += c; for (char c : tChars) sum_t += c; return sum_t - sum_s; } }

public class Solution { public int findNthDigit(int n) { return computeFindNthDigit(n); } private int computeFindNthDigit(int n) { int size = 1; long length = 9; int start = 1; while (n > length * size) { n -= length * size; size++; length *= 10; start *= 10; } start += (n - 1) / size; String s = Integer.toString(start); return Character.getNumericValue(s.charAt((n - 1) % size)); } }

public class Solution { public boolean validWordAbbreviation(String word, String abbr) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (true) { boolean isWithinRange = i < word.length() && j < abbr.length(); if (!isWithinRange) break; if (Character.isDigit(abbr.charAt(j))) { if (abbr.charAt(j) == '0') return false; // leading zero int num = 0; while (j < abbr.length() && Character.isDigit(abbr.charAt(j))) num = num * 10 + (abbr.charAt(j++) - '0'); i += num; } else { if (word.charAt(i++) != abbr.charAt(j++)) return false; } } return i == word.length() && j == abbr.length(); } }

public class Solution { public int characterReplacement(String s, int k) { int colCount = s.length(); int left = 0, right = 0, maxFreq = 0, result = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (right = 0; right < colCount; right++) { freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']++; maxFreq = Math.max(maxFreq, freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']); if (right - left + 1 - maxFreq > k) { freq[s.charAt(left) - 'A']--; left++; } result = Math.max(result, right - left + 1); } return result; } }
public class Solution { public int arrangeCoins(int totalCoins) { int currentRow = 0; while (totalCoins > currentRow) { currentRow++; totalCoins -= currentRow; } return currentRow; } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public int numberOfArithmeticSlices(int[] nums) { int res = 0; int n = nums.length; Map[] dp = new HashMap[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { dp[i] = new HashMap<>(); for (int j = 0; j < i; ++j) { long diff = (long)nums[i] - (long)nums[j]; boolean isWithinRange = diff <= Integer.MIN_VALUE || diff > Integer.MAX_VALUE; if (isWithinRange) continue; int delta = (int)diff; dp[i].put(delta, dp[i].getOrDefault(delta, 0) + 1); if (dp[j].containsKey(delta)) { res += dp[j].get(delta); dp[i].put(delta, dp[i].get(delta) + dp[j].get(delta)); } } } return res; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List findDisappearedNumbers(int[] nums) { return computeFindDisappearedNumbers(nums); } private List computeFindDisappearedNumbers(int[] nums) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { int index = Math.abs(nums[i]) - 1; nums[index] = -Math.abs(nums[index]); } for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] > 0) { result.add(i + 1); } } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int poorPigs(int buckets, int minutesToDie, int minutesToTest) { return computePoorPigs(buckets, minutesToDie, minutesToTest); } private int computePoorPigs(int buckets, int minutesToDie, int minutesToTest) { int pigs = 0; while (Math.pow((minutesToTest / minutesToDie) + 1, pigs) < buckets) { pigs++; } return pigs; } }

public class Solution { public boolean canConstruct(String s) { int n = s.length(); for (int i = n / 2; i > 0; --i) { if (n % i == 0) { String substr = s.substring(0, i); for (int j = i; j < n; j += i) { if (!s.substring(j, j + i).equals(substr)) return false; } return true; } } return false; } }

public class Solution { public int getMaxRepetitions(String s1, int n1, String s2, int n2) { return computeGetMaxRepetitions(s1, n1, s2, n2); } private int computeGetMaxRepetitions(String s1, int n1, String s2, int n2) { int count1 = 0, count2 = 0, i = 0, j = 0; while (count1 < n1) { if (s1.charAt(i) == s2.charAt(j)) { j++; if (j == s2.length()) { j = 0; count2++; } } i++; if (i == s1.length()) { i = 0; count1++; } } return count2 / n2; } }

public class Solution { public String validateIP(String queryIP) { if (queryIP.split("\\.", -1).length == 4 && isValidIPv4(queryIP)) return "IPv4"; if (queryIP.split(":", -1).length == 8 && isValidIPv6(queryIP)) return "IPv6"; return "Neither"; } private boolean isValidIPv4(String queryIP) { String[] parts = queryIP.split("\\.", -1); for (String part : parts) { if (part.length() == 0 || part.length() > 3 || (part.length() > 1 && part.charAt(0) == '0')) return false; int num = 0; for (char ch : part.toCharArray()) { if (!Character.isDigit(ch)) return false; num = num * 10 + (ch - '0'); } if (num < 0 || num > 255) return false; } return true; } private boolean isValidIPv6(String queryIP) { String[] parts = queryIP.split(":", -1); for (String part : parts) { if (part.length() == 0 || part.length() > 4) return false; for (char ch : part.toCharArray()) { if (!Character.isDigit(ch) && !(ch >= 'a' && ch <= 'f') && !(ch >= 'A' && ch <= 'F')) return false; } } return true; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findMinStep(String board, String hand) { HashMap handMap = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : hand.toCharArray()) handMap.put(c, handMap.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); return findMinStepHelper(board, new HashMap(), handMap); } private int findMinStepHelper(String board, HashMap memo, HashMap hand) { if (board.isEmpty()) return 0; if (memo.containsKey(board)) return memo.get(board); int result = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < board.length(); i = j) { boolean isMatch = j < board.length() && board.charAt(i) == board.charAt(j); while (isMatch) ++j; char color = board.charAt(i); int required = 3 - (j - i); if (hand.getOrDefault(color, 0) >= required) { hand.put(color, hand.get(color) - required); String nextBoard = board.substring(0, i) + board.substring(j); int tmp = findMinStepHelper(nextBoard, memo, hand); if (tmp != -1) result = Math.min(result, tmp + required); hand.put(color, hand.get(color) + required); } } int res = (result == Integer.MAX_VALUE) ? -1 : result; memo.put(board, res); return res; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashSet; import java.util.List; import java.util.Set; public class Solution { public List> findSubsequences(int[] nums) { Set> res = new HashSet<>(); List path = new ArrayList<>(); if (path.size() >= 2) { res.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); } for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (!path.isEmpty() && path.get(path.size() - 1) > nums[i]) { continue; } path.add(nums[i]); Set> tempRes = new HashSet<>(); List tempPath = new ArrayList<>(path); for (int j = i + 1; j < nums.length; j++) { if (!tempPath.isEmpty() && tempPath.get(tempPath.size() - 1) > nums[j]) { continue; } tempPath.add(nums[j]); dfs(nums, j + 1, tempPath, tempRes); tempPath.remove(tempPath.size() - 1); } res.addAll(tempRes); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } return new ArrayList<>(res); } }

public class Solution { public int findTargetSumWays(int[] nums, int target) { int sum = 0; for (int num : nums) sum += num; boolean isMatch = sum < target || (sum + target) % 2 != 0; if (isMatch) return 0; int target_sum = (sum + target) / 2; int[] dp = new int[target_sum + 1]; dp[0] = 1; for (int num : nums) { for (int j = target_sum; j >= num; j--) { dp[j] += dp[j - num]; } } return dp[target_sum]; } }

public class Solution { public int findPoisonedDuration(int[] timeSeries, int duration) { if (timeSeries.length == 0) return 0; return computeFindPoisonedDuration(timeSeries, duration); } private int computeFindPoisonedDuration(int[] timeSeries, int duration) { int total = 0; for (int i = 1; i < timeSeries.length; ++i) { total += Math.min(timeSeries[i] - timeSeries[i - 1], duration); } return total + duration; } }

public class Solution { public List findMode(TreeNode root) { List modes = new ArrayList<>(); if (root == null) return modes; Map frequencyMap = new HashMap<>(); Stack stack = new Stack<>(); TreeNode currentNode = root; int maxFrequency = 0; while ((currentNode != null || !stack.isEmpty())) { boolean isMatch = currentNode != null || !stack.isEmpty(); if (isMatch) { while (currentNode != null) { stack.add(currentNode); currentNode = currentNode.left; } currentNode = stack.pop(); frequencyMap.put(currentNode.val, frequencyMap.getOrDefault(currentNode.val, 0) + 1); maxFrequency = Math.max(maxFrequency, frequencyMap.get(currentNode.val)); currentNode = currentNode.right; } else { break; // This line is added to handle the case when both conditions are false } } for (Map.Entry entry : frequencyMap.entrySet()) { if (entry.getValue() == maxFrequency) modes.add(entry.getKey()); } return modes; } }

public class Solution { public String convertToBase7(int num) { if (num == 0) return "0"; boolean negative = num < 0; int absNum = Math.abs(num); StringBuilder result = computeConvertToBase7(absNum, new StringBuilder()); return negative ? "-" + result.toString() : result.toString(); } private StringBuilder computeConvertToBase7(int num, StringBuilder result) { while (num > 0) { result.insert(0, num % 7); num /= 7; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int findRotateSteps(String ring, String key) { int n = ring.length(), m = key.length(); int[][] dp = new int[m + 1][n]; for (int i = m - 1; i >= 0; --i) { for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { dp[i][j] = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int k = 0; k < n; ++k) { if (ring.charAt(k) == key.charAt(i)) { int diff = Math.abs(j - k); int step = Math.min(diff, n - diff); dp[i][j] = Math.min(dp[i][j], step + dp[i + 1][k]); } } } } return dp[0][0] + m; } }

public class Solution { public int change(int amount, int[] coins) { int[] dp = new int[amount + 1]; dp[0] = 1; // Initialize the DP array with base case for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] = 0; } // Iterate over each coin type for (int coin : coins) { // Update the DP array based on current coin value for (int i = coin; i <= amount; i++) { dp[i] += dp[i - coin]; } } return dp[amount]; } }

public class Solution { public int findLUSlength(String firstString, String secondString) { if (firstString.equals(secondString)) { return -1; } return Math.max(firstString.length(), secondString.length()); } }

import java.util.List; public class Solution { public int findLUSlength(List strs) { for(int i = 0; i < strs.size(); ++i) { boolean isUncommon = true; for(int j = 0; j < strs.size(); ++j) { if(i != j && strs.get(j).contains(strs.get(i))) { return -1; // Early return when a common substring is found } } } return maxLength; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public String findLongestWord(String s, String[] dictionary) { String longest = ""; Arrays.sort(dictionary); for (String word : dictionary) { boolean isWithinRange = i < s.length() && j < word.length(); if (isSubsequence(s, word)) { if (word.length() > longest.length()) { longest = word; } } } return longest; } private boolean isSubsequence(String s, String word) { int i = 0, j = 0; while (i < s.length() && j < word.length()) { if (s.charAt(i) == word.charAt(j)) { j++; } i++; } return j == word.length(); } }
